_provenance: Calibrated by examples/calibrate_empirical.py --format skempi (non-negative least squares of per-term binding-ΔΔG deltas vs experiment). Binding regime: ΔΔG_bind from score_binding_mutation. Fit on 53 SKEMPI v2 single point mutations across 9 complexes (1CSE,2SIC,1ACB,1CHO,1R0R,1PPF,1SBN,2PTC,1BRS). PRELIMINARY baseline — expand for production. NOTE: these are BINDING weights, a different regime from the folding-stability empirical_weights.json; load explicitly via EmpiricalScorer(weights=...), do not use as the stability default.
